title: Join and Share: Support the Tasmil DeFi Revolution!
description: Join Tasmil’s community and help spread the word about our AI-powered DeFi platform to earn reward points.
descriptionDetail:
### 🌐 About Tasmil
Tasmil is an **AI-driven DeFi platform** that empowers users with **intelligent trading**, **portfolio optimization**, and **automated yield farming** — all powered by decentralized technology.

### 🔥 Your Mission
1️⃣ **Follow** the official [Tasmil Twitter](https://twitter.com/tasmil) account.  
2️⃣ **Retweet** the pinned post with hashtags **#Tasmil #DeFi #Web3**.  
3️⃣ **Join** the [Tasmil Discord](https://discord.gg/tasmil) and verify your account.  
4️⃣ **Submit proof** of completion to claim your rewards.

### 🎁 Rewards
- Earn **100 reward points**.  
- Get a chance to join **upcoming whitelist campaigns**.  
- Become an **early supporter** of the Tasmil DeFi ecosystem.
